findings: Backward packet length features exhibit substantial class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and unique value disparities.
Local label-topology consistency checks reveal moderate neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts around Bwd Packet Length Mean, Std, and Max.
No resolution of conflicting local label patterns was achieved within bounded neighborhoods.
contradictions: Persistent local label neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts in backward packet length features.
limitations: Analysis limited to bounded local neighborhoods without expansion to global or aggregated contexts.
No further bounded evidence acquisition possible within budget to resolve conflicts.
